intro: Only perfect teamwork can conquer the peak.
description:
Bound together by mystical chains, you and your team must climb a deadly mountain where every step is shared, every movement requires perfect coordination, and every mistake can pull the entire group into danger.

As you ascend through steep cliffs, unstable paths, and unpredictable terrain, teamwork becomes your only way forward, forcing you to rely on timing, balance, and trust to survive the climb and push ever closer to the summit.

As you climb higher, the environment becomes increasingly harsh and unpredictable. Steep cliffs, unstable terrain, and shifting paths constantly challenge your ability to stay in sync. The chain connecting you adds both tension and strategy, forcing careful timing and cooperation at every step of the journey.

Key Features:
• Shared Chain Movement: Every action impacts the whole team.
 • Cooperative Climbing: Work together to overcome vertical challenges.
 • Dynamic Environments: Shifting terrain that tests coordination.
 • Team Progression: Unlock new mountain zones as you improve.

Climb as one, move as one, survive as one — every step forward is a shared victory, and every mistake is a shared consequence.
